list.title: Messages
list.emptyHint: Jab aap kisi verified ride se contact karenge to chats yahan dikhengi.

thread.empty: Abhi koi message nahi — hello bolo 👋
thread.readOnly: Yeh ride khatam ho gayi hai — chat sirf padhne ke liye hai
thread.attachError: Add nahi hui. Choti image try karein.
thread.blockBody: Wo aapko message nahi bhej payenge, aur yeh chat nahi dikhegi. Aap unhe baad mein Profile → Blocked se unblock kar sakte ho.
